image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if your body sent messages that could start a storm?
Context visual: Cytokines are like text messages for immune cells, guiding responses to infections.
Escalation visual: But what happens when those messages go haywire?
Evidence visual: In a cytokine storm, excessive signals can overwhelm the body, leading to severe inflammation.
Payoff visual: This dysregulation may contribute to conditions like COVID-19, but research is ongoing.
Cta visual: Want to understand your immunity better? Follow for more science insights!
